features.name: packed union with nested packed struct
features.description: Code should include a packed union containing a nested packed struct with multiple fields
features.snippet: union packed { logic [32-1:0] [8-1:0] idx; struct packed { logic [16-1:0] z, y, x; logic [32-2*3-1:0] [8-1:0] r; } nam; } gpr;

features.name: part select on struct member within packed union
features.description: Code should include a part select operation on a struct member accessed through a packed union hierarchy
